description_long: This house features a simple, modern rectangular structure with a prominent gable roof section in terracotta color, contrasting with the teal blue exterior walls. The front facade includes large glass windows and a main entry door, providing ample natural light and a welcoming appearance. On one side, there is a covered carport or garage space integrated into the building's footprint. The roof is mostly pitched, with a flat section extending over the garage area, and visible roof fixtures such as vents or skylights. The windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern on the front, while the other sides are largely solid with minimal fenestration. The scale of the house, compared to the human figure, suggests a single-story suburban dwelling suitable for a small family.
description: A modern, single-story house with a terracotta gable roof, teal blue walls, large front windows, and an integrated garage or carport.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door, large windows, and the garage/carport opening on the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof section over the garage and minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Rear view with a mostly solid wall and the gable roof extending over the main living area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the expanse of the flat roof and the absence of windows or doors.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows on front, minimal on sides and rear
attribute_entryway_design: Single main door with no steps, flanked by large windows, and a covered carport integrated into the facade
